items.text:
Subject: Spring Internship Fair — Confirmation for Friday, April 24

Dear Daniel,

Thank you for registering for the Spring Internship Fair on Friday, April 24, in Wexler Auditorium from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

A few notes before you arrive:
- Please bring at least ten printed copies of your résumé; recruiter booths will not accept emailed versions on-site.
- The $5 entry fee covers your name badge and a portfolio folder. Cash only at the welcome desk.
- A free professional headshot station closes at 1:30 PM, so plan to visit early if interested.

Business casual attire is required for entry. If you cannot attend, email me by Wednesday, April 22, to release your spot for waitlisted students.

Best,
Carla Reyes
Career Services

format_metadata.subject: Spring Internship Fair — Confirmation for Friday, April 24

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Daniel bring to the fair on April 24?

options.A: A signed permission form from his academic advisor
options.B: A digital copy of his résumé on a USB drive
options.C: At least ten printed copies of his résumé
options.D: A list of companies he wants to interview with

questions.explanation: The email instructs Daniel to bring at least ten printed copies of his résumé and notes that recruiters will not accept emailed versions on-site.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who arrive after 1:30 PM?

options.A: They will not be admitted to the fair at all
options.B: They will miss the chance to get a free headshot
options.C: They must pay a higher entry fee than early arrivals
options.D: They will receive a partial refund of the entry fee

questions.explanation: The email states the free headshot station closes at 1:30 PM, so students arriving after that time will no longer have access to that service.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this email?

options.A: To confirm Daniel's registration and outline fair logistics
options.B: To advertise an upcoming networking workshop for students
options.C: To request Daniel's feedback about last year's fair
options.D: To remind Daniel about a missed payment deadline

questions.explanation: The email confirms Daniel's registration for April 24 and walks through what to bring, the entry fee, the headshot station, and the cancellation deadline.
